query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.clientName,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media WHERE projectId = p.id AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL) as gps_media_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media WHERE projectId = p.id) as total_media_count
FROM projects p
JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'claybechtol@gmail.com'
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
